job: turn a creator capsule into a publishable social image proof that keeps the hook, memory, crop safety, public boundary, and remix handles intact before posting

social_contract.safe_crop: keep the hook and proof stamp inside a centered 1040x500 safe zone so platform thumbnails can crop edges without losing the idea
social_contract.alt_text: A warm editorial social card saying Make the idea portable before it gets posted, with proof and remix labels.

social_grammar.layout: wide editorial card with a left proof rail, oversized hook, center-safe crop, and small remix barcode
social_grammar.type: serif display hook, compact mono route labels, clear sans supporting line
social_grammar.color: warm paper, carbon ink, electric blue proof mark, green publish-safe stamp, amber signal texture
social_grammar.motion: still social card now; future animation may sweep the proof rail without changing the hook safe zone

allowed: DASH typography and crop-safe layout grammar

retention: selected social-surface mutation retained as example plus script and CI gate; do not promote a package primitive until at least two social/export surfaces prove the same crop-safe contract
